data.description:
Three scripts added in commit 2026-04-23 lack dedicated tests:

- plugins/dso/scripts/onboarding/plugin-inventory.sh (132 lines): JSON/table emit, hook-wired detection heuristic, sibling-subdir discovery logic.
- plugins/dso/scripts/onboarding/detect-enforcement-artifacts.sh (48 lines): JSON detection of ARCH_ENFORCEMENT.md, docs/adr/, CLAUDE.md invariants section.
- plugins/dso/scripts/onboarding/adr-upsert.sh (113 lines): slug-keyed ADR create-or-append with 4-digit zero-padded numbering and revision-note appending.

Identified by /dso:review deep-tier verification reviewer (2026-04-23).

Suggested test shape: tests/unit/scripts/test-plugin-inventory.sh, test-detect-enforcement-artifacts.sh, test-adr-upsert.sh — fixture directories + JSON-schema validation + round-trip assertions (create then append for adr-upsert).
data.title: Add test coverage for new architect-foundation scripts (plugin-inventory, detect-enforcement-artifacts, adr-upsert)
